greeting: Well hello there, fellow pixel-pushers and plugin aficionados!
introParagraph: This week's 'Release Radar' is buzzing with a mix of essential fixes, intriguing new payment gateways, and even a groundbreaking UI enhancement that could seriously level up your page-building game. While the total count was modest, the impact of some of these updates is anything but.

highlights.title: Thrive Themes 10.9.2
highlights.summary: Thrive Architect just dropped the 'Navigator Panel' – a game-changer that transforms how you interact with complex page layouts, letting you easily browse, search, and jump to any element. Say goodbye to endless scrolling and hello to precision editing!

highlights.title: WP Simple Pay 4.17.3
highlights.summary: Expanding its global reach, WP Simple Pay now supports PIX and BLIK payment methods for forms in Brazilian Real and Polish Złoty, respectively. Plus, you get a new per-form setting to disable Stripe Link on off-site Checkout forms, offering more control over your payment flows.

highlights.title: Easy Digital Downloads 3.6.9
highlights.summary: EDD is streamlining the checkout experience with new PayPal support for Fastlane and additional payment methods for newly connected stores. This update promises smoother transactions and fewer abandoned carts for your digital products.

highlights.title: WPForms Lite 1.10.2
highlights.summary: WPForms has beefed up its Abilities API, now supporting the creation of new forms, editing existing fields, and tweaking form settings directly. This opens up a world of possibilities for custom integrations and programmatic form management.

closingJoke: Why did the WordPress developer break up with the plugin? Because it had too many unresolved dependencies and kept crashing their production site!
